stability.method: top-8 subspace overlap across train halves

faithfulness.note: linear pathway born-faithful by construction; not an achievement

verdict: W4 battery complete: L1 CrystalScore 0.69 (F 1.0 born-linear x S 0.70 x St 0.98); the frontier shows quality vs parsimony explicitly; the KT-B flat-twin caveat is closed with paired z -0.34 (pooled advantage NOT individually significant - the FULL-PASS reading of KT-B softens to 'ordering PASS + directional representational dividend').

POST_REVIEW_CORRECTION.stability_caveat: St=0.981 is floor-inflated: an 8-of-10-dim subspace has hard floor 0.75, random-subspace chance 0.802 mean / 0.853 p95; real beats chance (representation exists) but as a multiplicative factor it overstates - chance-rescaled ~0.90, and the k=4 read (~0.71) would give CrystalScore ~0.50. Honest range: CrystalScore(L1) = 0.50-0.69 depending on the stability convention; dims 3-8 individually unstable.
POST_REVIEW_CORRECTION.frontier_caveat: frontier cells carry no placebo guard - cite the SHAPE (knee at D~4), never the z values as certified skill
POST_REVIEW_CORRECTION.clean: S out-of-sample correct; flat-twin paired z correctly aligned and conservative; frontier internally comparable
